description: Technology-driven health insurance company. Built modern tech stack for claims processing, provider networks, and member experience. Operates in individual, small group, and Medicare Advantage markets.
business_model: B2C/B2B - Health insurance to individuals and employers
key_investors: Public company, early investors include Khosla, Founders Fund, Google Capital
competitive_advantage: Tech-first insurance, member experience focus, API-driven operations

varden_fit.rationale: Tech-enabled payer - demonstrates modern insurance infrastructure
